wiki.summary: The song “CANNIBALISM!” by Slayyyter explores the intense and self-destructive desire that can arise in passionate relationships. Cannibalism serves as a metaphor for being emotionally and psychologically consumed by love and one’s own inner darkness. Blending sensuality with danger, the track reflects on how attraction can turn into obsession and how, in seeking another person, one may lose parts of themselves. The music video reinforces this duality between glamour and horror Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: The song “CANNIBALISM!” by Slayyyter explores the intense and self-destructive desire that can arise in passionate relationships. Cannibalism serves as a metaphor for being emotionally and psychologically consumed by love and one’s own inner darkness. Blending sensuality with danger, the track reflects on how attraction can turn into obsession and how, in seeking another person, one may lose parts of themselves. The music video reinforces this duality between glamour and horror, symbolizing total surrender and the confrontation with one’s inner demons. Read more on Last.fm.
